mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, io_id, line_no, accessory_id, warehouse_code, qty, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from equipment_accessory_io_entry where io_id = #{ioId} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by line_no asc
mapper.insert: insert into equipment_accessory_io_entry (id, tenant_id, io_id, line_no, accessory_id, warehouse_code, qty, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{ioId}, #{lineNo}, #{accessoryId}, #{warehouseCode}, #{qty}, #{remark}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
